Footer.description: Premium concierge services in Mauritania. We provide airport pickup, private drivers, hotel assistance, and VIP services for foreigners, diplomats, and investors.

Hero.title: Your Personal Concierge
Hero.subtitle: Airport pickup, accommodation, private driver, translation, VIP assistance, and travel support.

airport-pickup.title: Airport Pickup
airport-pickup.shortDescription: Premium airport transfer service with meet & greet and private transportation.
airport-pickup.fullDescription: Our VIP airport pickup ensures a smooth transition from Nouakchott International Airport. We provide meet & greet services, help with luggage, and secure private transportation in air-conditioned vehicles straight to your hotel.

private-driver.title: Private Driver
private-driver.shortDescription: Secure business transportation and city transport with professional daily chauffeurs.
private-driver.fullDescription: Navigate the city safely and comfortably with our private driver service. Ideal for business professionals and tourists needing secure, daily chauffeur services across Mauritania.

hotel-assistance.title: Hotel Assistance
hotel-assistance.shortDescription: Assistance finding VIP and business accommodation perfectly suited to your needs.
hotel-assistance.fullDescription: We help you discover the finest hotels and VIP accommodations in Mauritania. We manually locate apartments and business stays tailored to your security and luxury needs.

translation.title: Translation Services
translation.shortDescription: Professional translation services for meetings and administrative tasks.
translation.fullDescription: Communication is key. We offer premium translation in English, French, and Arabic. We accompany you during meetings, administrative matters, and negotiations to ensure perfect understanding.

business-vip.title: VIP Delegation Assistance
business-vip.shortDescription: Full assistance and transportation coordination for companies and investors.
business-vip.fullDescription: Complete support tailored for VIPs, delegations, and NGOs. We handle transportation coordination, secure schedules, and deep business support to ensure your trip is a complete success.

tourism.title: Tourism & Desert Tours
tourism.shortDescription: Nouakchott tours and epic trips to Chinguetti and Banc d’Arguin.
tourism.fullDescription: Explore the vast beauty of Mauritania. From the historic deserts of Chinguetti to the coastal beauty of Banc d’Arguin. We manually arrange bespoke tourism experiences.

ServiceDetail.bookSubtitle: No online forms to fill out. Contact us directly on WhatsApp to coordinate the details and secure this service manually.

ServicesOverviewPage.title: Comprehensive Concierge Services
ServicesOverviewPage.subtitle: We provide end-to-end luxury solutions for individuals, groups, and delegations inside Mauritania.

About.title: Elevating the Standard of Hospitality in Mauritania
About.p1: Mauritania Concierge was founded on a simple principle: foreigners traveling to Mauritania deserve a premium, secure, and seamless experience. Whether you are an investor, a diplomat, a delegation, or a tourist, arriving in a new country can be challenging. We bridge that gap by offering world-class personal concierge services.
About.p2: We take pride in our deep local roots combined with international standards of excellence. From VIP airport greetings to complex business coordination, our tailored approach ensures absolute comfort and peace of mind.
About.f1Desc: Your safety and privacy are our top priorities. We arrange secure transport and vetted accommodations.
About.f2Desc: We deliver international standards of hospitality, ensuring every detail of your stay feels luxurious and refined.
About.f3Desc: Nothing is automated. We manually oversee every single service request to guarantee personalized VIP attention.

Contact.pageSubtitle: We are here to assist you with all your needs in Mauritania. Reach out directly on WhatsApp or fill out the form below.
Contact.title: Request Assistance
Contact.success: Thank you! Your request has been received. We will contact you on WhatsApp shortly.
Contact.error: Oops! Something went wrong. Please try contacting us directly via WhatsApp.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about traveling to Mauritania and our premium concierge services.
FAQ.pageSubtitle: We have compiled answers to the questions we commonly receive from foreigners arriving in Mauritania.

items.question: Is Mauritania safe for foreigners and investors?
items.answer: Yes, Mauritania is safe, especially for business travelers and tourists. The capital Nouakchott is very secure. However, having a local concierge and private driver significantly enhances your comfort, security, and ease of navigation.

items.question: Do you provide airport pickup at Nouakchott International Airport?
items.answer: Absolutely. Our VIP airport pickup service includes a meet & greet, help with luggage, and a private air-conditioned vehicle waiting to transfer you to your hotel.

items.question: Can you help business travelers and delegations?
items.answer: Yes, we specialize in assisting NGOs, diplomats, and investors. We coordinate your transportation, manage schedules, and provide translation services for smooth business operations.

items.question: Do you speak English?
items.answer: Yes, our team provides full assistance and translation services in English, French, and Arabic.

Testimonials.title: Trusted by International Delegations
Testimonials.subtitle: Read what our clients have to say about their experience with our premium concierge services in Mauritania.

items.name: Jean-Pierre Laurent
items.review: The airport pickup and VIP assistance provided a seamless experience for our entire delegation. Highly professional and deeply trustworthy.

items.name: Ahmed Al-Mansoori
items.review: Excellent service from start to finish. The private driver was punctual and the translation services made our business meetings highly successful.

items.name: Sarah Jenkins
items.review: As an investor visiting Mauritania for the first time, Mauritania Concierge made everything incredibly easy and secure. The hotel assistance was top tier.

Tours.pageSubtitle: Expertly crafted itineraries for unforgettable journeys
Tours.whatsAppPrefix: Hello, I am interested in booking the {tour} {duration} tour. Please send me more information.

classic.title: Classic Mauritania
highlights: Day 1: Arrival Nouakchott, airport pickup, check-in, city tour
Day 2: Drive to Atar, visit ancient city, traditional lunch
Day 3: Chinguetti - UNESCO Site, ancient libraries, sand dunes
Day 4: Full day in desert, camel ride, Sahara night camp
Day 5: Terjit Oasis, natural springs swimming, picnic
Day 6: Return to Atar, local market, artisan crafts
Day 7: Drive back to Nouakchott, departure

richat.title: Richat Structure Adventure
highlights: Day 1: Arrival Nouakchott, rest and briefing
Day 2: Drive to Atar, visit ancient city
Day 3: 4x4 expedition to Richat Structure (Eye of Africa)
Day 4: Explore surrounding desert, Ouadane ancient city
Day 5: Return to Nouakchott, departure

banc.title: Banc d'Arguin & Coast
banc.route: Nouakchott → Banc d'Arguin National Park → Nouakchott
highlights: Day 1: Arrival Nouakchott, coastal tour
Day 2: Banc d'Arguin National Park (UNESCO), flamingo boat trip
Day 3: Nouamghar village, traditional fishing, beach lunch
Day 4: Return Nouakchott, departure

full.title: Full Mauritania Explorer
full.route: Nouakchott → Banc d'Arguin → Atar → Chinguetti → Terjit → Richat → Ouadane → Tidjikja → Nouakchott
highlights: Complete grand tour combining all major destinations expertly.
Includes Richat Structure, Tidjikja, and Banc d'Arguin.
Extended desert stays and profound cultural immersion.

business.title: Business & City
highlights: Airport VIP pickup
Hotel assistance
City tour (National Museum, Grande Mosquée)
Business meeting support
Departure assistance
